stemHtml: For a Class A aircraft, following an engine failure during take-off, what is the net take-off flight path?

options.a: It is the same as the gross take-off flight path as there is no margin after an engine failure.
options.b: It is the actual flight path reduced by a safety margin.
options.c: It is the minimum flight path to just clear the obstacles.
options.d: It is the actual flight path that the aeroplane will follow.
